evals.prompt: 帮我给这个 move_images.py 文件添加详细的中文注释，让新手也能看懂
evals.expected_output: Dispatcher should route to code-commenter skill in single-skill mode. Should inform user and invoke code-commenter.

evals.prompt: 帮我做一个漂亮的活动策划 PPT，要包含活动流程、预算表和视觉设计
evals.expected_output: Dispatcher should enter multi-skill mode: 1) task-clarifier to clarify event type/audience/style, 2) brainstorming to design PPT structure, 3) pptx to generate the PPT. Should present execution plan.

evals.prompt: 分析一下这个目录下的图片数据集，看看有什么特点
evals.expected_output: Dispatcher should recognize this as a vague task and route to task-clarifier first to clarify what aspects to analyze, output format, etc.
